MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Gage L.P. is present. Represented by George Gage.
Attorney, Guadalupe Gamino, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Anthony La Pierre and Anita Erhard, are present.
Attorney, Arthur Tan, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-20-2010 is vacated.
